scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:orders-sync" "PORTAL_DEV_PORT=3005 npm run dev:portal" "CENTER_DEV_PORT=3004 PORTAL_DEV_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3005 npm run dev:center"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@aiops/shared && npm run build --workspace=@aiops/service-portal && npm run build --workspace=@aiops/service-center
